tools.name: getserviceprovision
tools.description: Fetch service provision details for an ID.

tools.name: get_service_managers_v1
tools.description: Get a list of available service managers.

tools.name: get_service_manager_v1
tools.description: Retrieve details for a specific service manager by passing the service manager ID.

tools.name: getserviceoffer
tools.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific service offer by supplying its unique identifier in the request path.
To obtain valid service offer IDs, use the `Get service offers` endpoint to list available offers.

tools.name: getserviceofferregions
tools.description:
Retrieve a list of service offer regions by applying filters. Each service offer region represents a service offer provisioned in a specific region.

**Pagination:** This API supports cursor-based pagination. Provide the cursor in the `next` query parameter to retrieve the next page.

tools.name: getserviceoffers
tools.description:
Retrieve a list of service offers by applying filters. A service offer provides a distinct set of functionality that can be independently identified and assigned access.

**Pagination:** This API supports cursor-based pagination. Provide the cursor in the `next` query parameter to retrieve the next page.

tools.name: get_service_manager_provision_v1
tools.description: Retrieve details for a specific service manager provision entry using the ID for the entry.

tools.name: getserviceprovisions
tools.description:
Retrieve a list of service provisions by applying filters. A service offer provides a distinct set of functionalities that can be independently identified and assigned access. Service offers are typically associated with roles and permissions, commerce, metering, quote-to-cash, and trial evaluations. A service provision occurs when a service offer is provisioned (added) to a workspace.

**Pagination**: This endpoint supports cursor-based pagination using the `next` query parameter. Provide the cursor in the `next` query parameter to retrieve the next page.

tools.name: get_service_manager_provisions_v1
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all service manager provision entries.

tools.name: service_managers_for_a_region_v1
tools.description: Retrieve a list of service managers deployed to a particular region.

tools.name: getserviceofferregion
tools.description:
Retrieve detailed information about a specific service offer region by providing its unique identifier in the request path.
To obtain valid service offer region IDs, use the `Get service offer regions` endpoint to list available regions.

tools.name: per_region_service_managers_v1
tools.description: Retrieve a list of available service managers categorized by region.
